creator: zab@zltech.eu
text:
(***) Check with portlint:

FATAL: Makefile: URL "https://app.uio.no/ifi/texcount/download.php?file=" should end with "/" or a group name (e.g. :something)

Link is from official page:
https://app.uio.no/ifi/texcount/history.html

There might be a better structure in Makefile for these kind of URLs.
Any suggestion welcome.
